title: Superhits Of 90s
desc: Relive the '90s with Superhits! Romantic melodies, peppy beats, and timeless nostalgia—dance, sing along, and fall in love all over again!

title: Dharmendra He Man Of Bollywood
desc: Time-travel through Dharmendra's iconic hits – the ultimate He-Man of Bollywood! Timeless romance, unforgettable melodies that define an era of pure masala magic!

title: Alka Yagnik Superhit Singer
desc: Press play on nostalgia! Alka Yagnik's velvet voice brings back memories with these evergreen hits that still give us goosebumps today.

title: Dimple Kapadia & Neetu Singh
desc: Dance through the disco era with Dimple & Neetu! Playful whispers, foot-tapping romance, and melodies that defined a generation’s dreams.

title: Mithun Chakraborty
desc: Get ready to groove with Mithun Da's greatest hits! From 'Disco Dancer' to romantic ballads, this collection is pure Bollywood retro gold.
